packageRules.description: Group all GitHub Actions bumps into a single weekly PR
Group Go module bumps (Dagger SDK + transitives)

customManagers.description: Track tool versions pinned as Go consts in main.go (Terraform, TFLint, terraform-docs, Checkov, Python)
customManagers.datasourceTemplate: {{#if (equals depNameCamel 'Terraform')}}github-releases{{else if (equals depNameCamel 'TFLint')}}github-releases{{else if (equals depNameCamel 'TerraformDocs')}}github-releases{{else if (equals depNameCamel 'Checkov')}}pypi{{else if (equals depNameCamel 'Python')}}docker{{/if}}
customManagers.depNameTemplate: {{#if (equals depNameCamel 'Terraform')}}hashicorp/terraform{{else if (equals depNameCamel 'TFLint')}}terraform-linters/tflint{{else if (equals depNameCamel 'TerraformDocs')}}terraform-docs/terraform-docs{{else if (equals depNameCamel 'Checkov')}}checkov{{else if (equals depNameCamel 'Python')}}python{{/if}}
